---
title: "In-Class Exercise 3"
author: "CHUA Wee Tian"
date: "May 2, 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
---

[Exercise 3a](https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/wee.tian.chua/viz/Book2_17777069687130/Story1?publish=yes)

[![](image/image1.png){width="430"}](https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/wee.tian.chua/viz/Book2_17777069687130/Story1?publish=yes)

[Exercise 3b](https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/wee.tian.chua/viz/Book2b_17777069060610/Sheet1?publish=yes)

[![](image/image2.png){width="430"}](https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/wee.tian.chua/viz/Book2b_17777069060610/Sheet1?publish=yes)
